payload.description: New York City Transit - presents budget, financial plans, operating results, and service changes to the Transit & Bus Committee
MTA Bus Company - presents budget, financial plans, and operating results to the Transit & Bus Committee
Staten Island Railway - presents budget, financial plans, and operating results to the Transit & Bus Committee
Provides quarterly reports to the Committee on financial and operating indicators including collection activities and data on revenue and expenses
Publishing body of the 2022 Proposed Transit & Bus Committee Work Plan

payload.claim_text: An official record of proceedings which occurred during the previous month's Committee meeting.
payload.subject: Approval of Minutes
payload.description: Recurring agenda item - Approval of Minutes

payload.claim_text: A monthly update of any edits and/or changes in the work plan.
payload.subject: NYCT Work Plan
payload.description: Recurring agenda item - NYCT Work Plan

payload.claim_text: Summary presentation on the performance of Subway and Bus Service, including a discussion on Safety, Finance and Ridership. Information includes discussion on key indicators for Subway and Bus Customer-Focused and Performance metrics.
payload.subject: Operations Performance Summary
payload.description: Recurring agenda item - Operations Performance Summary

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurements
payload.description: Recurring agenda item - Procurements

payload.claim_text: Service proposals presented for Committee information and for Board approval, when required. Proposals outline various subway service initiatives.
payload.subject: Service Changes
payload.description: Recurring agenda item - Service Changes

payload.claim_text: Proposals presented to the Board for approval of changes affecting NYCT fare policy structure.
payload.subject: Tariff Changes
payload.description: Recurring agenda item - Tariff Changes

payload.claim_text: Proposals presented to the Board for approval of changes to NYCT's 5-Year Capital Program.
payload.subject: Capital Budget Modifications
payload.description: Recurring agenda item - Capital Budget Modifications

payload.claim_text: Staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval of items affecting business standards and practices
payload.subject: Action Items
payload.description: Recurring agenda item - Action Items
Quarterly report to the Committee on Transit Adjudication Bureau financial and operating indicators including collection activities and data on revenue and expenses.
NYCT will present its revised 2023-2026 Financial Plan.
SIR will present its revised 2023-2026 Financial Plan.
MTA Bus will present its revised 2023-2026 Financial Plan.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to NYCT's and MTA Bus' Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be provided with the work plan for 2023 and will be asked to approve its use for the year.

The annual update to the NYCT Committee on the status of compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) at New York City Transit. The report summarizes activities for compliance including, rehabilitation of key stations and ADA requirements in bus and subway transportation.
Quarterly report to the Committee on Transit Adjudication Bureau financial and operating indicators including collection activities and data on revenue and expenses.
Quarterly report to the Committee which provides estimated revenue lost to fare evasion on subways and buses based on staff surveys of stations and routes.

payload.description: Quarterly report to the Committee on Transit Adjudication Bureau financial and operating indicators including collection activities and data on revenue and expenses.
Quarterly report to the Committee which provides estimated revenue lost to fare evasion on subways and buses based on staff surveys of stations and routes.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to NYCT's and MTA Bus' Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.

Quarterly presentation of customer satisfaction ratings about NYCT's bus, subway, and paratransit services. Report will identify trends from customer surveys results about key indicators and attributes that define the customer experience.
A detailed year-end 2022 report to the committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to NYCT's and MTA Bus' Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
NYCT will present a monthly allocation of its 2022 Mid-Year Forecast including revenues/receipts, expenses/expenditures, ridership and positions to the Committee.
NYCT will present a monthly allocation of SIR's 2022 Mid-Year Forecast including revenues/receipts, expenses/expenditures, ridership and positions to the Committee.
